# x-twitter-scraper_monitor (Resource)

Real-time X account monitoring



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `event_types` (List of String)
- `username` (String) X username (without @)

### Optional

- `is_active` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
